title: Generate Prisma Client in the Railway API image build
required_validation_commands: docker run --rm --entrypoint node matchpulse-api-prisma-generate-a -e "const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client'); new PrismaClient(); console.log('PrismaClient constructed');"
expected_results: new PrismaClient() constructs inside the image without the initialize error
No migration runs and no database connection or mutation occurs
DATABASE_URL, Neon configuration, schema, migrations, dependencies, lockfiles, and deployment configuration remain unchanged
network_allowed_operations: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile when the offline cache is insufficient
